studyName: Genetic Predictors of Adverse Radiotherapy Effects (Gene-PARE)

tables.description: Subject ID, ethnicity, erectile dysfunction, prostatic rectal bleeding, AUASS score before and after radiotherapy, prostate resection, age at time of radiotherapy, radiotherapy type, anti-androgen therapy, prostate tumor stage, Gleason score, PSA, CT scan, radiation dose, smoking, diabetes, and  hypertension status, and use of alpha-blocker drugs among participants with or without prostate cancer and involved in the "Genetic Predictors of Adverse Radiotherapy Effects (Gene-PARE)" project.

variables.name: CT.Volume
variables.description: Prostate volume on CT scan prior to radiotherapy

variables.name: EBRT.Dose
variables.description: Radiation dose delivered from external beam radiotherapy

variables.name: ED
variables.description: Erectile dysfunction

variables.name: IPSS.delta.y1
variables.description: Change in AUASS score from baseline recorded between 1 and 2 years following radiotherapy

variables.name: IPSS.delta.y2
variables.description: Change in AUASS score from baseline recorded between 2 and 3 years following radiotherapy

variables.name: IPSS.delta.y3
variables.description: Change in AUASS score from baseline recorded between 3 and 4 years following radiotherapy

variables.name: IPSS.delta.y4
variables.description: Change in AUASS score from baseline recorded between 4 and 5 years following radiotherapy

variables.name: PreRT.AUASS
variables.description: Pre-radiotherapy AUASS score

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

variables.name: Total.BED
variables.description: Total biologically effective dose, combining EBRT and implant dose when both treatments were used, calculated using an

variables.name: age.at.Rx
variables.description: Subject age at time of radiotherapy

variables.name: alpha.blockers
variables.description: Use of alpha-blocker drugs during treatment or follow-up

variables.name: diabetes
variables.description: Diabetes status at the time of radiotherapy

variables.name: gleason.score
variables.description: Gleason score of prostate tumor

variables.name: hormones
variables.description: Anti-androgen therapy given before, during and/or after radiotherapy

variables.name: hypertension
variables.description: Hypertension status at the time of radiotherapy

variables.name: initial.PSA
variables.description: Blood concentration of prostate specific antigen (PSA)

variables.name: prior.TURP
variables.description: Transurethral resection of the prostate prior to radiotherapy

variables.name: proctitis
variables.description: Proctitis/rectal bleeding

variables.name: prostatectomy
variables.description: Radical prostatectomy prior to radiotherapy

variables.name: race
variables.description: Self-reported race/ethnicity of participant

variables.name: smoker
variables.description: Smoking status at the time of radiotherapy

variables.name: stage
variables.description: Prostate tumor stage

variables.name: treatment
variables.description: Radiotherapy type (external beam radiotherapy, EBRT; brachytherapy)

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, histological type, tumor status, and genotype center of participants with or without prostate cancer and involved in the "Genetic Predictors of Adverse Radiotherapy Effects (Gene-PARE)" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, sample source ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with or without prostate cancer and involved in the "Genetic Predictors of Adverse Radiotherapy Effects (Gene-PARE)" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, and source subject ID of participants with or without prostate cancer and involved in the "Genetic Predictors of Adverse Radiotherapy Effects (Gene-PARE)" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate
